title: 拔苗助长
meaning: 比喻违反客观规律，急于求成

scenes.title: 禾苗生长
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, an impatient farmer in yellow clothes looking at small green rice seedlings in field, anxious expression, sunny day
scenes.narration: 有个农夫种了禾苗，希望它们快点长高。

scenes.title: 拔高禾苗
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, the farmer in yellow clothes pulling rice seedlings upward from roots, bad idea, sweat drops, field scene
scenes.narration: 他把禾苗一棵棵往上拔，想让它们长快点。

scenes.title: 禾苗枯萎
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, the farmer in yellow clothes crying next to wilted dead seedlings, devastated expression, other healthy field in background
scenes.narration: 结果禾苗全都枯死了，急于求成反而坏事。
